titleEn: Harold van Mastwijk (Lehmann & Troost) breaks into the top three as Guido de Bruijn (Agrofair) holds on to the lead
contentHtml: After another weekend of World Cup action, plenty of new names have entered the top 10. Nevertheless, Guido de Bruijn remains in the lead. The account manager at Agrofair has now accumulated 5,295 points. In second place is fruit and vegetable lawyer Hans Borsboom of Herik Legal, whose career, like that…
